sets.instructions_cn: 用括号中动词的正确形式（动名词或不定式）填空

steps.expected: I enjoy swimming in the pool.
He likes reading books before bed.
steps.hint_cn: like 后可接 doing 或 to do，意思相近

steps.base: They finished [build] the house last month.
steps.expected: They finished building the house last month.
I decided to take a break.

sets.instructions_cn: 将两句话合并为一句，用动名词或不定式

steps.base: I like music. I listen to music every day.
steps.cue: 合并为一句，用 like + doing
steps.expected: I like listening to music every day.
steps.hint_cn: like doing 表示喜欢做某事

steps.base: She wants a new phone. She will save money.
steps.cue: 合并为一句，用 want + to do
steps.expected: She wants to save money for a new phone.
steps.hint_cn: want to do 表示想要做某事

steps.base: He is good at drawing. He draws every weekend.
steps.cue: 合并为一句，用 be good at + doing
steps.expected: He is good at drawing every weekend.
steps.hint_cn: be good at 后接动名词

steps.base: My brother plays games. He enjoys it.
steps.cue: 合并为一句，用 enjoy + doing

steps.base: I need to rest. I feel tired.
steps.cue: 合并为一句，用 need + to do
steps.expected: I need to rest because I feel tired.
steps.hint_cn: need to do 表示需要做某事

sets.instructions_cn: 根据问题用动名词或不定式完整回答

steps.base: What do you enjoy doing in your free time?
steps.expected: I enjoy reading books in my free time.

steps.base: What do you want to be when you grow up?
steps.expected: I want to be a doctor when I grow up.
steps.hint_cn: want to do 表示未来目标

steps.base: What did you finish doing yesterday?
steps.expected: I finished doing my homework yesterday.

steps.base: What do you suggest doing this weekend?
steps.expected: I suggest going to see a movie this weekend.

steps.base: What do you need to do before the exam?
steps.expected: I need to review my notes before the exam.
steps.hint_cn: need to do 表示需要做的事
